title: Millionaire Shortbread
description: Layers of buttery shortbread, smooth caramel, and rich milk chocolate ganache.

title: Chocolate Brownie
description: Rich, dense chocolate brownies with a gooey centre and a crackly top.

title: Granola Seeded Bar
description: A wholesome and crunchy granola bar packed with seeds and natural sweetness.

title: Bakewell Tart
description: A classic Bakewell tart with almond frangipane, raspberry jam, and a buttery pastry base.

title: Banana Loaf
description: Moist and flavourful, baked with ripe bananas, nuts, and a hint of cinnamon.

title: Lemon Drizzle
description: Light and fluffy sponge soaked in tangy lemon syrup and finished with a sweet glaze.

title: Orange Loaf
description: A citrusy delight with a fresh orange zest aroma and a soft, moist crumb.

title: Red Velvet
description: A rich and moist red velvet cake with a hint of cocoa, topped with smooth cream cheese frosting.

title: Carrot Cake
description: Moist and spiced, packed with fresh carrots, and topped with light cream cheese frosting.

title: Pistachio Cake
description: A soft and nutty pistachio-flavored cake with a delicate crumb and subtle sweetness.

title: Almond and Raspberry Cake
description: A delightful blend of nutty almonds and vibrant mixed berries.

title: Victoria Sponge
description: Layers of light vanilla sponge filled with sweet strawberry jam and whipped cream.
